name: Asset Export
description: Render any catalog asset — or a Lolly tool link — out to any format and size.

inputs.label: Asset
inputs.help: The asset to render — a catalog id (see `lolly assets`) or a pasted lolly.tools tool link. Vector assets stay vector through SVG/PDF; raster assets embed as images.

inputs.label: Fit
inputs.help: Contain shows the whole asset inside the frame; Cover fills the frame and may crop the edges.

inputs.label: Background
inputs.help: The colour behind the asset. Turn on "No BG" in export to drop it (transparent).

inputs.label: No background
inputs.help: Drop the background fill so the asset exports on transparency (PNG/SVG/WebP).
